case_title: RICHIE LYNNETTE VS TOLSON CARLTON N. JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RICHIE LYNNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT TOLSON CARLTON N. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TOLSON CARLTON N. JR.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHIE LYNNETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOLSON CARLTON N. JR. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INVALID SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NO DESCRIPTION OF PARTY SERVED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TOLSON CARLTON N. JR.
